summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest, 13/13) and frontend (Playwright) testing of FullTuneMedia photography portfolio. All endpoints, admin auth, contact flow, photo CRUD, portfolio filters, and admin dashboard (upload/delete/inquiries) work as expected. No _id leaks. Dark cinematic UI loads cleanly.
action_items: Minor doc-only: review_request listed contact form selectors as 'contact-name-input/contact-email-input/contact-message-input' but actual implementation uses 'contact-input-name/contact-input-email/contact-input-message'. Update agent context note for next iteration to avoid confusion (no functional fix needed).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured (~165 lines). MongoDB _id is correctly excluded via projection in find queries.
Admin auth uses constant-time-equivalent string comparison; consider hmac.compare_digest for timing-attack resistance (low priority for shared-token use case).
Photo image_data accepts arbitrary base64 payload up to MongoDB 16MB doc limit; consider explicit size validation on the backend to match the frontend's 'MAX 5 MB' label.
datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() round-trip via fromisoformat is fine but Mongo native Date would be cleaner for sorting/indexing.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking, low priority).
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed photos and contacts during pytest. One TEST_FE_Photo created in admin UI test (deleted via admin UI). One TEST_User contact remains in DB (visible in admin Inquiries section).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers root, admin verify (good/bad), contact create+list, photo create+list+filter+delete (auth gates and 404). All 13 tests pass. Contact form data-testids in code are: contact-input-name, contact-input-email, contact-input-subject, contact-input-message, contact-submit-button (NOT contact-name-input as in the original review note). Admin page testids match review note exactly. shadcn Select for category triggers 'Automotive/Motorcycle/Architecture/Portrait' option labels (capitalized) but stores lowercase values. Hidden file input data-testid='admin-photo-file' accepts page.set_input_files directly.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 11 features in review_request validated successfully.
